title: 7 Best Google Sheets Alternatives (Free & Paid)
dek: The best Google Sheets alternatives are Microsoft Excel for power, Zoho Sheet for a free all-rounder, LibreOffice Calc for offline desktop use, and Airtable or Coda when you have outgrown a plain grid. Here is who each one is best for.

seo.metaDescription: The best Google Sheets alternatives in 2026, free and paid — from Excel and Zoho Sheet to Airtable — with who each one is best for.

richText: Google Sheets is excellent, but it is not for everyone — maybe you need to work offline, want more power, or have hit its performance limits on big files. These seven alternatives cover every reason people switch, from free desktop apps to modern database-spreadsheet hybrids.

body.caption: Google Sheets alternatives at a glance

body.text: The best all-round free option: Zoho Sheet

body.richText: Zoho Sheet is the closest free, browser-based competitor to Google Sheets. It offers real-time collaboration, a deep function library, and data-cleaning tools, all without cost for individuals. If you want the Sheets experience but off Google's ecosystem, start here.

body.text: The best for offline desktop use: LibreOffice Calc

body.richText: LibreOffice Calc is a free, open-source desktop spreadsheet that needs no account and works fully offline. It reads and writes Excel files and is a favorite for people who want ownership of their files without a subscription.

body.text: When you have outgrown a plain grid: Airtable and Coda

body.richText: If your spreadsheet has really become a mini-database — tasks, projects, inventory — Airtable and Coda add structure a flat grid cannot: linked records, multiple views (kanban, calendar), and automations. They cost more and have a learning curve, but they replace tangled spreadsheets with real systems.
If your only reason to leave is raw power, the answer might just be Excel — not a new tool to learn. Compare them directly before switching.

richText: Not sure Excel is worth it over Sheets? Read our full

link.text: best spreadsheet software for small business

items.question: What is the best free alternative to Google Sheets?
items.answerRichText: For a browser-based, collaborative experience, Zoho Sheet is the closest free match. For an offline desktop app with no account required, LibreOffice Calc is the top free choice.

items.question: Is there a Google Sheets alternative that works offline?
items.answerRichText: Yes. LibreOffice Calc and the desktop version of Microsoft Excel both work fully offline. Apple Numbers also works offline on Mac and iPhone.
